Home / Lore / Locations

Lore category

Locations

Source-linked locations records in the Raigulus Division Lore Archive.

10structured records

location

Camp White Oak

A remote woodland estate used as a strategic Black Tusk position and extraction site for President Ellis.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Capitol Hill

The True Sons strongpoint where President Ellis and the encryption key needed to reach the broad-spectrum antiviral are held.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Coney Island

The New York setting of Episode 3, divided between a Black Tusk operation at the ballpark and a Cleaner presence at the amusement park.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Lower Manhattan

The New York setting of Warlords of New York, divided among returning factions and rogue Agents during the hunt for Aaron Keener.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Manhattan Dark Zone

The initial containment zone where first-wave Agents are abandoned and where supply drops create a dangerous scavenging economy.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Manning National Zoo

The Episode 1 location fortified by the Outcasts after Emeline Shaw retreats from Roosevelt Island.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Midtown Manhattan

The central operating area Division Agents are activated to secure against the Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

The Pentagon

The abandoned and storm-damaged military headquarters placed under siege by Black Tusk during Episode 2.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Tidal Basin

Black Tusk's principal Washington stronghold and the site where Division Agents recover the broad-spectrum antivirals.

not applicablesource reviewed

location

Washington, D.C.

The primary setting of The Division 2, where institutional collapse, civilian reconstruction and competing factions converge around the U.S. capital.

not applicablesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
